pronunciation: /藞m蓻d瑟k蓹l r瑟藞s蓾藧t蕛 藞pr蓱d蕭蓻kt/
englishDefinitions: A planned study in medicine or health science designed to find new information or solutions.
persianTranslation: 倬乇賵跇賴贁 倬跇賵賴卮 倬夭卮讴蹖
胤乇丨 鬲丨賯蹖賯丕鬲蹖 倬夭卮讴蹖
倬跇賵賴卮 倬夭卮讴蹖
examples: She joined a medical research project at the university.
The medical research project studied a new treatment for asthma.
Funding for the medical research project came from several donors.
